description:
The SpawnArc component spawns in users along the arc of a circle, with an optional weight to select this spawner.

}}

fields.Weight: The likelihood of this spawner being chosen for a spawning user.
fields.Capacity: How many users this spawner can have spawned at a time.
fields.Radius: The range of how far this spawner can spawn this user.
fields.Arc: The shape of how the spawner will place the user.
fields.UsersPerArc: The segment area for the users to spawn at in this arc.
fields.CenterArcOffset: The offset rotation of the center of the arc circle for this spawner.
fields.GrowBothSides: The option to extend both sides for the spawn arc, fanning out from a center point.
fields.RowHeightOffset: The hieght where the users will spawn along the circle.
fields.OrientUser: Positions and rotates the user towards the center.
fields.ParentUser: Keeps the user parented onto this specific spawner slot.
fields.TiltUsers: Tilts the user when spawning in.
fields.PositionNode: Takes the position of the user's body node for spawning.
fields.RotationNode: Takes the rotation of the user's body node for spawning.
fields._testSlots: Internal: Shows the number of test slots on this spawning arc.

usage: Used to help shape how you want users to spawn in a world.
